steps.title: Identify the key comparison
steps.content: The passage specifies tribal economic activity as over \$7.3 billion. The student needs to rank this figure against the three industries in the table.

steps.title: Determine the correct ranking from table data
steps.content:
The table shows accommodation/food services at \$5.2 billion, health care at \$13.7 billion, and retail at \$10.7 billion. The \$7.3 billion tribal figure ranks above accommodation/food services but below both health care and retail.

The other three choices misstate this ranking. That matches choice B — B is correct.
